narrative:
Barberton 5-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,109 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.3 percentage points.
